brief: Trump imposes new 'forced labor' tariffs on 80+ nations as Middle East tensions escalate; Justice Dept. drops NYT subpoenas; a usability study finds LLM-based product advisors opaque.
news_summary: Trump's new 10-12.5% tariffs replace the global 10% duty, citing forced labor, while the Justice Department withdraws subpoenas for NYT journalists. In the Middle East, the UN warns the crisis is 'getting out of control' as Houthi attacks threaten global shipping.
papers_summary: A formative usability study on conversational product advisors reveals that large language models can be fluent but opaque, hiding ranking logic and evidence. Other papers explore wearable AI for fiction writing, AR accessibility for deaf students, and a semantics-driven visualization language called Flint.

en.brief: Trump imposes new 'forced labor' tariffs on 80+ nations as Middle East tensions escalate; Justice Dept. drops NYT subpoenas; a usability study finds LLM-based product advisors opaque.
en.news_summary: Trump's new 10-12.5% tariffs replace the global 10% duty, citing forced labor, while the Justice Department withdraws subpoenas for NYT journalists. In the Middle East, the UN warns the crisis is 'getting out of control' as Houthi attacks threaten global shipping.
en.papers_summary: A formative usability study on conversational product advisors reveals that large language models can be fluent but opaque, hiding ranking logic and evidence. Other papers explore wearable AI for fiction writing, AR accessibility for deaf students, and a semantics-driven visualization language called Flint.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦曼德海峡航运危机、AI取代工作担忧、香港民主派人士胡志伟在英险遭遣返及台湾陆配参选资格新规；研究方面无中文论文，英文论文多关注AI与可视化交互设计。
zh.news_summary: 胡塞武装威胁曼德海峡可能引发全球航运危机；香港47人案被告胡志伟在伦敦机场被扣后获准入境；台湾收紧陆配参选资格，要求除籍满十年；美国与沙特签署核协议引核扩散担忧。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文。英文论文主要探讨AI在对话系统、创意写作、无障碍技术及数据可视化中的可用性与伦理问题，包括可穿戴AI眼镜辅助写作、增强现实对聋哑学生的支持等。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. swaying with ocean currents, the Justice Department bent under judicial pressure and dropped the subpoenas.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
